SEARCH
Module com.example.simul2d
Package com.example.simul2d.Systems.input.Commands

Interface Command

All Known Implementing Classes:
AddEntityCommand, ClearEntitiesCommand, DecreaseSpeedCommand, IncreaseSpeedCommand, LoadCommand, PauseCommand, RectangleEntityCommand, RectangleMaterialCommand, RemoveEntityCommand, SaveCommand, SetMaterialCommand, SpeedCommand, StepCommand
public sealed interface Command permits PauseCommand, SpeedCommand, IncreaseSpeedCommand, DecreaseSpeedCommand, SetMaterialCommand, AddEntityCommand, RemoveEntityCommand, RectangleMaterialCommand, RectangleEntityCommand, SaveCommand, LoadCommand, ClearEntitiesCommand, StepCommand
Marker interface for parsed input commands.

Concrete command implementations are represented as records and enumerate the arguments required to perform the action. The simulation's input subsystem translates raw user input into these command objects which are then executed by InputHandler.
